random_10_299.scope_note: Archived comparison variant. It uses fix_samples=0 with num_samples_low=10 and num_samples_high=300, so numpy randint draws 10..299. It is not the paper-faithful random 1..300 run.
random_10_299.provenance_note: Commit 535b7b3 added the tracked lightweight artifacts for this run. This report is an archived implementation-default random 10..299 comparison variant; metrics and checkpoint hashes are unchanged by wording-only audit corrections.
commands: python scripts/train.py --config configs/s_dpm_thr2_rand10_300.yaml --phase both --device cuda:0 --epochs 50 --run-dir reports/s_dpm_thr2/rand10_300_50ep

firstU.note: Checkpoint files are intentionally ignored by git; reproduce them with the saved config and command log.

secondU.note: Checkpoint files are intentionally ignored by git; reproduce them with the saved config and command log.

sparse_samples.drawn_distribution_method: RNG replay for test split with seed=experiment.seed+20000, matching DataLoader test worker 0; replay includes the per-item num_samples draw and subsequent x/y coordinate randint calls without reading PNG files.
sparse_samples.alignment_method: real RadioUNet_s DataLoader audit over first 8 test batches (120 items) with num_workers=0.
sparse_samples.note: drawn sample count is random under fix_samples=0; observed nonzero sparse-channel count can be lower because duplicate coordinates and zero target values collapse entries.

random_1_300.scope_note: This is the paper-faithful random sample count run: fix_samples=0, num_samples_low=1, num_samples_high=301, and numpy randint therefore draws 1..300.
commands: python scripts/train.py --config configs/s_dpm_thr2_rand1_300.yaml --phase both --device cuda:0 --run-dir reports/s_dpm_thr2/rand1_300_50ep

python scripts/make_figures.py --config configs/s_dpm_thr2_rand1_300.yaml --checkpoint reports/s_dpm_thr2/rand1_300_50ep/checkpoints/secondU.pt --split test --device cuda:0 --limit 8 --output-dir reports/s_dpm_thr2/rand1_300_50ep/figures

firstU.note: Checkpoint files are intentionally ignored by git; reproduce them with the saved config and command log.

secondU.note: Checkpoint files are intentionally ignored by git; reproduce them with the saved config and command log.

sparse_samples.drawn_distribution_method: Real RadioUNet_s DataLoader replay with num_workers=0 and a temporary np.random.randint recorder; records exactly the per-item num_samples draw where low/high/size match the config.
sparse_samples.note: drawn sample count is the requested random count; observed nonzero sparse-channel count can be lower because duplicate coordinates and zero target values collapse entries.

paper_faithful_reproduced: RadioUNet_s / DPM / threshold=0.2 / seed=42 / batch_size=15 的 Stage 2 random 1..300 训练、评估和 rerun 已完成。
random 1..300 的 test split RNG replay 证明 drawn count 为 1..300。
firstU/secondU 50 epoch、checkpoint manifest、8 张图和 metrics 归档完整。
controlled_ablation: fixed 50/100/200/300 是 controlled ablation，用来隔离 sparse sample count 对性能的影响。
implementation-default random 10..299 是历史实现默认口径对照，不是论文 1..300。
not_full_paper_reproduction: Stage 2 仍只覆盖当前 DPM/complete-city-map/test split 口径，不覆盖论文所有仿真/缺楼/transfer 设置。
IRT4 transfer、missing buildings 和 robustness 尚未在本阶段训练或评估。
reproduction_judgement.next_stage: Stage 3 应进入 IRT4 zero-shot transfer / missing buildings / robustness，因为 Stage 2 已完成 S 输入与随机样本数口径收口，剩余差距属于跨仿真与鲁棒性问题。
